title: Chococraft Delicacies
description: Chococraft is a food mod that adds new recipes, fruits, veggies and more to Minecraft.
body:
Chococraft is a food mod that adds new recipes, fruits, veggies and more to Minecraft.
![Foods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/884394fee91c9af5b099b99c0152f362cc3d35b2.webp)
Items

New crops/plants and where they can be found:

1. Vanilla flower/Vanilla (jungle)

2. Strawberry Plant/Strawberry (Plains)

3. Blueberry Bush/Blueberry (Birch Forest)

4. Banana plant/Banana (Bamboo Jungle)

5. (Purple and Green) Grape Bush/(Purple and Green) Grapes (forest)

6. Tomato Bush/Tomato (Plains)

7. Bellpepper Plant/Bellpepper (Flower Forest)

8. Corn (Plains)

9. Lettuce (Plains)

10. Mustard (Plains)

11. Red Onion (Plains)

12. Garlic (Mushroom Fields)

13. Rice (Plains)

14. Piper Nigrum/Pepper (Sparse jungle)

15. Cumin (Plains)

16. Turmeric (Cherry Grove)

17. Curry (Taiga)

18. Ginger (Sunflower Plains)

19. Coriander (Sunflower Plains)

20. Oregano (Sunflower Plains)

All the Plants in the Mod
![Plants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e44b03f51ca0c50aa48b711057d37fa62456fa.webp)

Some Ingrediënts come from tree leaves, here is a list of these ingrediënts and what leaves you will have to break for them:

Jungle Leaves: Lemon and Lime

Cherry Blossom Leaves: Cherry

Flowering Azalea Leaves: Peach

Mangrove Leaves: Mango

Oak Leaves: Orange, and Apple

Weeping Vines "Crimson Forest Vines": Chili Pepper

Leaves
![Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d986c509f5864cb96b4646d282f37290fe6e19e0.webp)

There are also 3 new cooking mechanics this mod introduces:

 

1. The Mortar and Pestle (Used to combine spices)
Mortar And Pestle
![MortarAndPestle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ce288be3adeea08fe65bdcb25845f5557771faf.webp)
2. The Freezer (Used to freeze things or to make frozen treats)

![Freezer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ba9e2c83f865ea72eb5fe5cb5158fc4b6bb8acd.webp)![FreezerGUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0010b55911386de3f4c928b838f36cdbac1d8f69.webp)

3. The Frying Pan (Used to make Fried Snacks)
![Frying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e60d614cc31ac2f0e88af3f6d10f6043e8544d6e.webp)![Shrimp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3b89e0a60381708e8362871a2f8bc327106a97f.webp)

The mod also adds a new tree: The Cinnamomum Verum Tree

![tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14099899d034589877f97c1110421392031c3d8b.webp)

It spawns in the Sparse Jungle Biome and you can craft the planks into Cinnamon.

![Cinnamon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea9f7f7cb9a4e382c97cadb54960587402f4e5ba.webp)

The mod also adds 1 new mob (as of now):
![Shrimp234](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e37225236c4b0aeb2dcc76f386b061cfb1ab83dd.webp)

The new Shrimp mob spawns in all ocean biomes.

If it dies it drops the Shrimp Item:

![Shrimp5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76062969ad0422162994cf2e251c4c55ee700f35.webp)

Here is a list of all the Freezer and Frying pan Recipes (since they do not appear in the recipe book or JEI)

Freezing:

Strawberry + Powdered Snow = Strawberry Ice Cream

Vanilla + Powdered Snow = Vanilla Ice Cream

Cacao Powder + Powdered Snow = Chocolate Ice Cream

White Chocolate Milk + Ice = White Chocolate

Chocolate Milk + Ice = Milk Chocolate

Hot Cocoa + Ice = Chocolate

Frying:

Potato + Olive Oil/Sunflower Oil = Fries

Chicken + Olive Oil/Sunflower Oil = Fried Chicken

Shrimp + Olive Oil/Sunflower Oil = Fried Shrimp

Rice + Olive Oil/Sunflower Oil = Fried Rice

 

All the crafting table recipes and smelting recipes can be found in the recipe book (The recipes are unlocked upon world generation)

There is also an Advancement system that will guide you through the Chocolate and Ice cream related recipes but I have not implemented such a sytstem for the other recipes yet.

 

Weird Recipe Exeptions:

Popcorn is made by putting corn in a blast furnace

Roasted Cocoa Beans are made by putting Cocoa Beans in a blast furnace

Different types of glass bottles are made by putting a glass bottle in a blast furnace and putting it back in until you get the shape you want

Hot Cocoa is made in a brewing stand with Cocoa Dust at the top and Glass Bottles at the bottom

New Items:
![Food3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/884394fee91c9af5b099b99c0152f362cc3d35b2.webp)
![Food4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6bf731e7434163495afaab2ca8d88819df4dfa1.webp)
![food65](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1c048d0d5d168c3b860e8b60f59d426b37fb210.webp)

If you need any help, found bugs or have suggestions, feel free to comment.
